securityNotice.title: Security Notice
securityNotice.description: Your bank account information is encrypted and stored securely. We will only use this information for legitimate government benefit disbursements. You can skip this step and add bank details later from your dashboard.

bankInfo.title: Bank Account Information
bankInfo.description: Please provide your bank account details for fund disbursement. You can validate your details now or skip and add them later from your dashboard.

documents.title: Upload Supporting Documents
documents.description: Upload your PAN card and bank passbook for verification (optional)

validation.fileType: Please upload PDF, JPG, or PNG files only
validation.fileSize: File size must be less than 10MB

messages.replaceConfirm: A {documentName} document already exists. Do you want to replace it?
messages.skipNotice: You can add bank details later from your dashboard
